productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Navy Blue Check Shirt
description: <b>Style Note</b> Proudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from locomotive. The Fit enhances your figure while the look oozes easy charm. Team this with jeans and sports shoes on a day out with friends or with leather shoes and a cool jacket for an evening date to create an excellent impression.  <b>Product Details</b> Blue, grey and white check shirt, has a slim spread collar, full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, two mid arm buttoned tabs to adjust the length while folding over the sleeves, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered branding above it, back yoke, buttoned tab on shoulders and curved hemline with branding above <b>Material and Care</b> 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach Tumble dry normal Use warm iron <b>Size and Fit</b> Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M <b>Style Note</b>Proudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from Locomotive.
